summary.intent: Fix review comments on PR #590 in the moltis repository, specifically addressing a command matching bug in the Matrix handler.
summary.outcome: Fixed the command prefix matching logic in handler.rs to use split_whitespace instead of starts_with, ensuring commands like /help don't falsely match /helpme or /helper. All 95 tests pass and changes were committed.

repo: The Matrix crate uses a gateway idiom for command parsing: extract command name via split_whitespace rather than starts_with for exact command matching.
PR reviews are fetched via Bash tooling against the moltis GitHub repo (moltis-org/moltis).

code.finding: Command matching must use split_whitespace to extract the command name rather than starts_with, to avoid prefix false positives (e.g., 'help' matching 'helpme').

workflow: Worktrees are used for parallel development; this session operated in /Users/penso/.superset/worktrees/moltis/wirehaired-glider.
Tests and formatting checks are run before committing fixes to PR review comments.

friction: PR review comment pointed out a subtle but impactful bug in command matching that was not caught before the initial PR submission.
